Yards from the Thames, in the churchyard of All Saints, which dates from the 12th Century, is the final resting place of the Victorian poet Matthew Arnold. In fact, the village of Laleham in Surrey is pretty much as quintessentially sleepy old England as you can still find. So locals whose children attend the Church of England primary here were surprised in recent weeks to find a young Afghan man repeatedly loitering outside, approaching female pupils – and becoming aggressive when spoken to.

The younger generations experience of the world is very different to the older ones. They have experienced the 2008 crash, suppressed wages and opportunities, austerity, closure of their youth facilities, massive student debt and now unaffordable homes and rents with the possibility of WW3 on the horizon. Even if they can afford to bring a child into this world why would they want to make another youngster suffer all the above?

From childhood, South Korean pop star Soyou dreamed about getting married, having three children and living in a house filled with the aroma of cooking. But like so many of her fellow female citizens, the 34-year-old singer - who became one of her nation's biggest stars with heartfelt songs about love, relationships and romance - has now abandoned such traditional ideas. In a candid interview last month, she disclosed that she decided during Covid that she did not want to bring a child into the world and had ruled out marriage. 'If I don't want children, why marry?' she said. Many other South Korean women are asking the same question - with the result that this highly successful Asian country is confronting the world's worst fertility crisis and arguably the most ferocious gender wars among younger generations.
  • 969 comments

There is a less invasive solution to this problem.I developed this intimate condition a few months after having my HRT coil removed. The whole nature of the skin in that area changed and the itching was unbearable. I was prescribed steroid and then hormone creams or ointments which didn't help or made things worse. Then a hospital consultant asked me to try a new prototype ointment, to be applied daily, and within a week, the itching and skin condition had completely recovered and returned to normal. Unfortunately, this was about 8 years ago and I can't remember the name of the ointment but it worked like a miracle.

Thousands of women with a devastatingly painful intimate itch condition could soon be offered a revolutionary treatment that can tackle many of the symptoms in weeks.

Russell Brand has admitted it was 'not the morally sound thing to do' to sleep with a 16-year-old girl, as he told Piers Morgan he may end up in prison. Customers at the popular bakery chain (pictured, file photo) can usually grab a range of bottled soft drinks, sandwiches and other food items from the shelves themselves. But several branches around the UK have now been fitted with a so-called theft-proof counter, with all products stored behind it, out of reach of diners. The company's shop in West Croydon, south London, is among those which have been renovated and has now reopened its doors to customers in recent days. Stores in nearby Croydon and Peckham, Whitechapel and Upton Park in east London, Birmingham, and Wilford, Nottinghamshire, have also all been transformed.

Of all the storms I have dealt with tornadoes are the worst as they have little to no time to prepare. My heart hurts for all of those impacted - may you stay as safe as possible.

The National Weather Service confirmed a tornado formed over the town of Braman in Kay County, Oklahoma near the Kansas border at around 7.30pm on Thursday. Just about an hour later, the weather service confirmed that another tornado formed at 8.40pm on the southeastern side of Enid, where it struck Vance Air Force Base.

  • The Chelsea experiment with youth players and hiring unproven managers is a dud. It is time for a more traditional approach if you want to win trophies now. That was the first strategic mistake the owners made, in my opinion. If you want to pair young, inexperienced players who have huge upside potential and you bring in an inexperienced manager based on future potential as well, then you must have patience and give time for the team to play together and gel. They might lose more than they win and you must allow it. But to demand trophies instantly with a team of essentially Under-21 players is asking for too much. Make up your mind what path do you want to go?
